mapper.select:
SELECT MODULE_TYPE, SCREEN_ID, SCREEN_NM, SCREEN_URL, USE_FLAG, DATA_AUTH_FLAG, REG_USER_NM, REG_DATE FROM ( SELECT SCRN.SCREEN_ID , SCRN.GATE_CD , (SCRN.REG_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS REG_DATE , SCRN.REG_USER_ID , GETMULTINAME(SCRN.GATE_CD, 'SC', #{ses.langCd}, '', SCRN.SCREEN_ID) AS SCREEN_NM , SCRN.MODULE_TYPE , SCRN.USE_FLAG , SCRN.SCREEN_URL , SCRN.DATA_AUTH_FLAG , (SELECT UR.USER_NM FROM STOCUSER UR WHERE UR.GATE_CD = SCRN.GATE_CD AND UR.USER_ID = SCRN.REG_USER_ID) AS REG_USER_NM FROM STOCSCRN SCRN WHERE SCRN.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND SCRN.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND SCRN.MODULE_TYPE = #{MODULE_TYPE}
) SC WHERE 1 = 1
AND UPPER(SCREEN_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SCREEN_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(SCREEN_URL) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SCREEN_URL}) '%'
AND UPPER(SCREEN_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SCREEN_ID}) '%'
ORDER BY MODULE_TYPE, SCREEN_ID
SELECT HELP_TEXT_NUM , HELP_ATT_FILE_NUM , SCREEN_ID FROM STOCSCRN WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND SCREEN_ID = #{paramScreenId} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
